'''Ekibo''' was a [[Trianii/Legends|Trianii]] colony [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in [[Trianii Space/Legends|Trianii Space]], famous for its farms and [[herdbeast]]s.<ref name="TEA" /> [[Trianii Rangers]] [[Atuarre]] and [[Keeheen]] were responsible for overthrowing a herdbeast-rustling ring there.<ref name="HSCS">''[[Han Solo and the Corporate Sector Sourcebook]]''</ref>
